name: clickhouse-best-practices
description: 28 best practice rules for ClickHouse schema design, query optimization, and data ingestion - prioritized by impact.

interface.shortDescription: Review ClickHouse schemas, queries, and ingestion against best-practice rules.
interface.longDescription: Use ClickHouse Best Practices to review schema design, query optimization, partitioning, JOINs, data types, ingestion, mutations, materialized views, and related ClickHouse design decisions against curated best-practice rules.
defaultPrompt: Review this ClickHouse schema against best practices.
Check this ClickHouse query for optimization issues.
